OpenGameArt damage decal sources — CC0 1.0 Universal (Public Domain Dedication)
https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/
Downloaded: 2026-07-24. No attribution required; credits retained as thanks.

details.zip (+ extracted details/ directory)
  "Details for damaged and dirty textures" — rubberduck
  https://opengameart.org/content/details-for-damaged-and-dirty-textures
  License(s) on page: CC0
  Contents: details.xcf (GIMP, layered: bullet holes, cracks, scratches,
  dirt overlays) + example_damaged.png. Source material for baking
  additional bullet-hole / concrete-chip decal variants to complement
  oga-bullet-decal/bullet_hole.png.
